title: US AI investment and earnings resilience
content: Mock earnings commentary highlights continued AI infrastructure spending, resilient margins, and broad investor appetite for US mega-cap technology exposure.

title: Japan policy normalization uncertainty
content: Mock central bank commentary points to uncertainty around the timing and pace of policy normalization, leaving yen sentiment cautious.

title: China property drag and confidence weakness
content: Mock macro news notes persistent property-sector stress, uneven household confidence, and a tentative policy response weighing on China equity sentiment.

title: Canada mortgage reset pressure
content: Mock housing commentary flags mortgage reset pressure, affordability constraints, and cautious bank commentary around household credit quality.

title: Brazil carry and external balance support
content: Mock EM FX strategy notes highlight carry support, constructive external balances, and continued investor demand for high-yielding local currency exposure.

title: Euro-area manufacturing and earnings weakness
content: Mock equity strategy commentary points to weak manufacturing data, subdued earnings revisions, and cautious investor tone across cyclical sectors.
